contractDrift: Public MCP schemas and docs disagree with runtime accepted shapes, including memory_embedding_reconcile mode versus documented dryRun.
Governed ingest fields are accepted and validated at the tool boundary but dropped before index persistence.
Comment-hygiene and routing guidance describe stricter behavior than implementation enforces.
metadataDrift: Graph metadata status often diverges from spec status, partly because implementation-summary fallback marks complete without checklist evidence.
Renumbered or consolidated phase identifiers remain in child metadata, links, and catalogs.
memoryCorrectness: Entity-density cache invalidation does not cover update/title-trigger changes.
Atomic save indexes before pending file promotion, creating a crash/promotion failure window.
Causal graph writers can create orphan or cross-scope edges when called with bare IDs.
deepLoopOrchestration: Fanout worker uses spawnSync inside capped pool, defeating intended concurrency.
Pool success accounting counts fulfilled worker promises rather than subprocess exit codes.
Per-lineage iterations affects timeout sizing but does not enforce loop iteration count.
